DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY EUGENE VLAHOS PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT MARIA D. ABRAHMS PRESENT IN PRO-PER. (DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFT PAUL ABRAHMS ON 9-12-95) PARTIES IN CHAMBERS FOR MOTIONS IN LIMINE. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. FINAL ARGUMENT WAIVED BY PARTIES, BRIEF FINAL REMARKS MADE BY BOTH SIDES. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED, EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT.
